name: QRY-0182
sql:
SELECT `tabLearner Submission`.activity_title AS `Activity Title`,
       `tabLearner Submission`.learner_display_name AS `Learner Display Name`,
       `tabLearner Submission`.learner_cohort AS `Learner Cohort`,
       `tabLearner Submission`.submitted_datetime AS `Submitted Datetime`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.nine_point_score_9 AS `Nine Point Score 9`,
       avg(`tabAssessment Output`.nine_point_score_9) AS avg_score
  FROM `tabLearner Submission` AS `tabLearner Submission`
 INNER JOIN `tabAssessment Output` AS `tabAssessment Output`
    ON `tabLearner Submission`.name = `tabAssessment Output`.parent
 WHERE `tabLearner Submission`.learner_cohort IS NULL
 GROUP BY `tabLearner Submission`.activity_title,
          `tabLearner Submission`.learner_display_name,
          `tabLearner Submission`.learner_cohort,
          `tabLearner Submission`.submitted_datetime
 ORDER BY `tabLearner Submission`.submitted_datetime ASC
 LIMIT 100

name: QRY-0188
sql:
SELECT `tabLearner Submission`.learner_display_name AS `Learner Display Name`,
       `tabLearner Submission`.activity_title AS `Activity Title`,
       `tabLearner Submission`.learner_cohort AS `Learner Cohort`,
       `tabLearner Submission`.submitted_datetime AS `Submitted Datetime`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.two_letter_words AS `Two Letter Words`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.three_letter_words AS `Three Letter Words`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.four_letter_words AS `Four Letter Words`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.five_letter_words AS `Five Letter Words`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.six_letter_words AS `Six Letter Words`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.seven_letter_words AS `Seven Letter Words`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.eight_letter_words AS `Eight Letter Words`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.nine_letter_words AS `Nine Letter Words`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.ten_letter_words AS `Ten Letter Words`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.greater_than_10_letter_words AS `Greater Than 10 Letter Words`
  FROM `tabLearner Submission` AS `tabLearner Submission`
 INNER JOIN `tabAssessment Output` AS `tabAssessment Output`
    ON `tabLearner Submission`.name = `tabAssessment Output`.parent
 WHERE `tabLearner Submission`.learner_cohort IS NULL
 GROUP BY `tabLearner Submission`.learner_display_name,
          `tabLearner Submission`.activity_title,
          `tabLearner Submission`.learner_cohort,
          `tabLearner Submission`.submitted_datetime
 ORDER BY `tabLearner Submission`.submitted_datetime ASC
 LIMIT 100

name: QRY-0190
sql:
SELECT `tabLearner Submission`.learner_display_name AS `Learner Display Name`,
       `tabLearner Submission`.activity_title AS `Activity Title`,
       `tabLearner Submission`.learner_cohort AS `Learner Cohort`,
       `tabLearner Submission`.submitted_datetime AS `Submitted Datetime`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.total_nouns AS `Total Nouns`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.total_proper_nouns AS `Total Proper Nouns`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.total_adjectives AS `Total Adjectives`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.total_verbs AS `Total Verbs`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.total_adverbs AS `Total Adverbs`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.total_prepositions AS `Total Prepositions`
  FROM `tabLearner Submission` AS `tabLearner Submission`
 INNER JOIN `tabAssessment Output` AS `tabAssessment Output`
    ON `tabLearner Submission`.name = `tabAssessment Output`.parent
 WHERE `tabLearner Submission`.learner_cohort IS NULL
 GROUP BY `tabLearner Submission`.learner_display_name,
          `tabLearner Submission`.activity_title,
          `tabLearner Submission`.learner_cohort,
          `tabLearner Submission`.submitted_datetime
 ORDER BY `tabLearner Submission`.submitted_datetime ASC
 LIMIT 100

name: QRY-0191
sql:
SELECT `tabLearner Submission`.activity_title AS `Activity Title`,
       `tabLearner Submission`.learner_display_name AS `Learner Display Name`,
       `tabLearner Submission`.submitted_datetime AS `Submitted Datetime`,
       `tabLearner Submission`.learner_cohort AS `Learner Cohort`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.conversation_contribution_pct AS `Conversation Contribution Pct`
  FROM `tabLearner Submission` AS `tabLearner Submission`
 INNER JOIN `tabAssessment Output` AS `tabAssessment Output`
    ON `tabLearner Submission`.name = `tabAssessment Output`.parent
 WHERE `tabLearner Submission`.learner_cohort IS NULL
 GROUP BY `tabLearner Submission`.activity_title,
          `tabLearner Submission`.learner_display_name,
          `tabLearner Submission`.submitted_datetime,
          `tabLearner Submission`.learner_cohort
 LIMIT 100

name: QRY-0186
sql:
SELECT `tabLearner Submission`.learner_display_name AS `Learner Display Name`,
       `tabLearner Submission`.activity_title AS `Activity Title`,
       `tabLearner Submission`.submitted_datetime AS `Submitted Datetime`,
       `tabLearner Submission`.learner_cohort AS `Learner Cohort`,
       `tabAssessment Output`.word_count AS `Word Count`
  FROM `tabLearner Submission` AS `tabLearner Submission`
 INNER JOIN `tabAssessment Output` AS `tabAssessment Output`
    ON `tabLearner Submission`.name = `tabAssessment Output`.parent
 WHERE `tabLearner Submission`.learner_cohort IS NULL
 GROUP BY `tabLearner Submission`.learner_display_name,
          `tabLearner Submission`.activity_title,
          `tabLearner Submission`.submitted_datetime,
          `tabLearner Submission`.learner_cohort
 ORDER BY `tabLearner Submission`.submitted_datetime ASC
 LIMIT 100
title: Word production (English)
